_note: D.1 producer-side cascade fixture for the small-power C.3 example (uk-ev-charge-domestic). UK 3-bed dwelling driveway hosting a single 7.4 kW Mode 3 AC EV charge point on the external garage wall. The driveway is modelled as room_type='external_landscape' — the Part-7 enum trigger forcing the small-power consumer's allOf clause requiring consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning. §722 is NOT zonal like §701 bath / §702 pool / §703 sauna / §710 medical / §715 ELV — the EV charge point does NOT derive a spatial zone. Instead the cascade emits 1 electrical_constraint of type rcd_blanket_by_room extended with EV-specific dedicated-circuit + DC-detection fields (additionalProperties: true on the constraints schema permits this). anchor_fixtures[] is empty (no §722-zonal anchor type — the EV charge point is wall-mounted equipment, not a zone-deriving anchor). The cascade is functionally a constraint-only emission. The intent-out.json payload is byte-identical to the payload inlined at C.3-ship in electrical/small-power/examples/uk-ev-charge-domestic/output.json consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning.payload — verified by Python dict equality at D.1 ship.

_special_locations_cascade_source.standalone_example_dir: electrical/special-locations/examples/uk-external-landscape-elv-lighting (analogous external_landscape pattern; §722 EV is constraint-only, no spatial zones)
_special_locations_cascade_source.consumer_invariant_signalled: INV-12 (4 sub-check sequence) on rooms[].room_type='external_landscape' Part-7 enum trigger; §722 EV-specific dedicated-circuit + DC-detection constraint cascaded to small-power
_special_locations_cascade_source._note: No upstream consumer intent — special-locations is the PRODUCER in this cascade; small-power is the CONSUMER. The cascade is a one-way special-locations -> small-power emission. consumed_lighting_layout_intent in the intent-out.json is null.

existing_fixtures._consumed_from: small-power intent (uk-ev-charge-domestic); 7.4 kW Mode 3 AC charge point on dedicated radial C03; BS EN 62196 Type 2 Mennekes socket; BS EN 61851-1 charging unit with integral 6 mA DC residual detection (right on the §722.531.3.101 Type A boundary)

ev_charge_inputs._citation: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §722 + §411.3.3 + IET Code of Practice for EV Charging Equipment Installation (4th Edition)
